user.title: CallAttendantNext Monitor
user.description: Subscribe to MQTT call events from CallAttendantNext.

data_description.mqtt_topic: The MQTT topic your CallAttendantNext app publishes to.
data_description.history_limit: Maximum number of calls to keep in history (10–5000).
